title: Title Fix Mod
description: When exiting a world or server, the in game title overlay will be cleared to prevent transferring to the next world.
body:
Not to be confused with [Title Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/title-fixer) which fits the title overlay into the screen (we both should have probably picked better names).

Title Fix Mod fixes the issue where title overlays bleed into other worlds/servers when quickly leaving/joining.

# Title Fix Mod

When exiting a world or server, the in game title overlay will be cleared to prevent transferring to the next world.

## What?

Ok so POV: you come back to your computer after a break, then you leave hypixel and join your smp.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/59705125/166203610-77ec84db-fe8b-45dd-9d4e-1fcc12c4ebbf.png)

And it just stays there... [menacingly](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LPmzRa-sXQs).

Title Fix Mod fixes this.
